name: Diva
description: A demon girl with a very specific dream: to be an angel. The heart of the Evil Diva series. Her devil horns and forked tail are at odds with her aspirations, and that tension is everything.

name: Navy Girl
description: Mayflower Shipman — Fighting Magical Girl and decorated naval officer. Trades her dress whites for demonstration colours on armed forces day. Accompanied by SKYHAWC, her Specialized Kinetic Yield High Altitude Weapon Carrier.

name: Loki
description: Guidance counsellor at the demonic high school. Steeple-fingered, perpetually plotting. Has only one real complaint about the devil-horned student body: they are always late to the bell.

name: Virgil
description: The principal. Shares Loki's exasperation with tardiness. Presides over a school where the supernatural is administrative, not extraordinary.

name: Blue Demon
description: A corrective — the previous version was judged to use far too much pink. Whether the overcorrection landed is a matter of record.

name: SKYHAWC
description: Navy Girl's aerial companion. The acronym stands for Specialized Kinetic Yield High Altitude Weapon Carrier. The second K remains an open problem.
